pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh which explicitly creates this directory for the target files.
Verified from export_result.sh which defines SCRIPT_PATH for execution.
Verified from export_result.sh which reads from OUTPUT_PATH to check the agent's work.

Verified by downloading the 3 real EPUB files from Project Gutenberg (IDs 84, 1342, 98) via Python script and dynamically parsing the OPF XML metadata to extract 'dc:title' and 'dc:creator', confirming the presence of the keywords.
Verified by downloading the hidden EPUB file from Project Gutenberg (ID 11) via Python script and parsing the OPF metadata to extract title and creator, confirming 'alice' and 'carroll'.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for sugar_env epub_metadata_extractor task. Verified that the real data downloaded from Project Gutenberg is used to populate the target EPUB files, and confirmed the explicit expected library, script, and output paths defined in the task scripts. Confirmed the metadata keywords correctly match the actual XML title and creator properties of the 4 specified downloaded ebooks. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable.
